creator: chinsan@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, Shaun Jurrens: 

I modified some part of your patch to respect FDP Writing style(Indentation) 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/fdp-primer/writing-style.html#AEN3225 

The modified patch: 
http://people.freebsd.org/~chinsan/doc/handbook-x11.sgml.diff 

Would you please take a review with this? 
Thanks. :) 

- chinsan
